name: dashride
description: Cross-platform motorcycle dashboard app with real-time speedometer and navigation

scripts.android: bun run build && bunx cap sync android && bunx cap run android --target=Pixel_9_Pro_XL
scripts.androidDebug: bun run build && bunx cap sync android && bunx cap run android --target=b755084c
scripts.ios: bun run build && bunx cap sync ios && bunx cap run ios --target=40BFA551-0C44-4975-8B1D-8993EF3BC65A
scripts.release:build: bun run build && bunx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew clean assembleRelease
scripts.release:bundle: bun run build && bunx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew clean bundleRelease
scripts.release:install: bun run release:build && cd android && ./gradlew installRelease
scripts.release:apk:
bun run release:build && echo '
✓ Release APK created at: android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk'
scripts.release:aab:
bun run release:bundle && echo '
✓ Release AAB created at: android/app/build/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab'
